MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William Reilly, Esq., 561-8440, for plaintiffs/cross-defendants William and Meghan Reilly
Scott Kalkin, Esq. of ROBOOSTOFF & KALKIN 732-0282, also for plaintiffs/
cross-defendants
Thomas J. Losavio, Esq. of LOW, BALL, LYNCH 981-6630, for defendants 1369 Hyde Street, Ltd. and Thomas Ballard
Jennifer C. Burden, Esq. of CHAPMAN & INTRIERI 510/864-3600, for defendant Chandler Properties, Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- PLAINTIFFs WILLIAM BERNARD REILLY and Megan Reilly's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION --
Summary adjudication of plaintiffs' first amended complaint: as to 1st c/a (Violation of BPC Section 17200) - Denied re: burden; 2nd c/a (Declaratory Relief) - Granted, no triable issue of fact re: illegal rent raise; 3rd c/a (Declaratory Relief) Granted: no triable issue of fact re: violation of Section 37.9.
Summary judgment of first amended cross-complaint: Granted as to defendant 1369 Hyde Street Ltd. and Thomas Ballard, no triable issue of fact re: damages. Denied as to Chandler Properties, Inc.
Plaintiff is to prepare an order. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
